dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, stop. We have an emergency and I need someone who can move fast.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A dangerous {enemy_type} broke free from the holding cells at {location} last night. Killed two sentries on the way out and took a {quest_item} from the armory. We tracked it heading {location_hint} but lost the trail at the river crossing. Every hour we waste, it gets farther away and more entrenched. {target_npc} is organizing a perimeter, but we need a tracker to run it down.
dialogueChunks.outro: Time is against us. Will you take up the hunt?

playerResponses.text: Show me where you lost the trail. I'll pick it up.
What's in it for me if I catch this thing?
Not my problem. Hire a bounty hunter.

dialogueChunks.intro: You there, {player_name}. I can see from your gear that you know how to handle yourself. Good. We need that right now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A pack of {enemy_type} has been raiding livestock near {location} for weeks. Three farms hit in the last four days alone. We've found their tracks leading {location_hint}, but every patrol I send comes back empty-handed or doesn't come back at all. These aren't ordinary beasts: they're organized, hitting at night and vanishing before dawn.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone who can track them to their den and end this. Before the next farm they hit has people in it instead of animals.

playerResponses.text: Organized predators? I know how to break a pack. Let's move.
I'll hunt them, but I keep whatever I find in their den.
Your patrols should handle this. It's not my fight.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. What I'm about to tell you doesn't leave this room.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We've been tracking a spy who's been feeding information about {location}'s defenses to a {enemy_type} warband. {target_npc} intercepted a coded message last night: the next attack is being planned as we speak. The spy was last seen heading {location_hint}. We need someone to follow the trail quietly, find out who they're reporting to, and put a stop to it before the warband strikes.
dialogueChunks.outro: Stealth and speed, {player_name}. Find the source and cut it off.

playerResponses.text: I'll shadow the trail and find their contact.
Spy hunting is delicate work. I expect proper compensation.
This sounds like a job for your own intelligence people.
